enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about a late-night work session mapping Roman roads and aqueducts onto Colorado geography as part of a personal project building a Roman Empire analog. He describes his process of tracing Via Appia and other roads using Google Earth and Wikipedia, and plans to continue mapping tribes and towns that day.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Excited and confident — believes the whole Roman Empire can be built out within a month
Recognizes a clear two-stage fatigue pattern: physical tiredness first, then mental decline, and respects it
Finds value in hearing different people explain history — variety of voices helps memorization
